title: Monday learning - Share a badge in Linkedin
excerpt:
Hey! 
Would be great to have an option to share a badge/ certificate in social media network (mainly Linkedin) when completing one of the courses in the MondayLearning platform.

posts.author: LironK (LironK)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey!
Would be great to have an option to share a badge/ certificate in social media network (mainly Linkedin) when completing one of the courses in the MondayLearning platform.

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Liron!

Welcome to the community! I Love this suggestion! I passed it on to the relevant teams.
Would love to hear more about which learning program you are thinking of for this. Are you using the monday.academy or monday certification program?

posts.author: LironK (LironK)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Juliette!
Thanks for reaching out.

I actually just finished the Admin official certification in the Monday certification program (I received this course from Monday after volunteering at the emergency response team).

Liron
